title: rubus × assurgens
intro: Rubus × assurgens, also known as the raspberry-leaved blackberry, is a hybrid plant that is a cross between the blackberry and the raspberry. The medicinal properties of Rubus × assurgens include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to have various health benefits. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and protect against certain diseases due to its high content of vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants. Herbal preparations of Rubus × assurgens include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies that can be applied topically or ingested to reap its benefits.
